content:
Hello everyone! I made a simple website for a small accessories store (in Bolivia) that a friend of mine started. I built it for free to gain some experience.
It mainly serves as a product catalog. There are no eCommerce features, as it simply redirects visitors to the owner's WhatsApp. All of the content is managed through Payload CMS and hosted on Cloudflare.
I'd like to start freelancing as a web developer, so I'd really appreciate your feedback. Do you think someone would pay for a website like this, or what should I work on?
Personally, I think the images could be better optimized, the hero section could look better (although I was following a reference the client preferred), and the animations might be a bit overdone.

  submitted by   /u/Not_a_Cake_
[link]   [comments]
